Class GraphService

java.lang.Object
services.GraphService
public class GraphService extends Object
Service class for graph operations and analysis.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GraphService(StreamingDatabase db)
     

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    StreamingGraph
    extractArtistContentSubgraph()
    Extracts a subgraph containing only Artists, Content items, and their participation relationships.
    StreamingGraph
    extractGenreSubgraph(String genreId)
    Extracts a subgraph containing only content of a given genre.
    StreamingGraph
    extractGenreUserSubgraph(String genreId)
    Extracts a subgraph containing only users, content of a given genre, and their watch/rate relationships.
    StreamingGraph
    extractRatingSubgraph(double minRating)
    Extracts a subgraph with rating relationships above a minimum threshold.
    StreamingGraph
    extractRegionSubgraph(String region)
    Extracts a subgraph containing only users of a given region and their watched/rated content.
    StreamingGraph
    extractUserArtistSubgraph()
    Extracts a subgraph containing Users, Artists, and their related Content items.
    StreamingGraph
    extractUserUserSubgraph()
    Extracts a subgraph containing only Users and their follow relationships.
    Iterable<User>
    findFollowersWhoWatchedSameFilm(String userId, String filmId, String startDateStr, String endDateStr)
    Determines which followers of a user watched a given film in a given time interval.
    Iterable<User>
    findUsersWithHighWatchTime(String genreId, String startDateStr, String endDateStr)
    Finds users who watched series of a specific genre within a given time interval.
    String
    getContentViewingStats(String contentId, String startDateStr, String endDateStr)
    Calculates viewing statistics for a specific content item between two dates.
    String
    getGenreViewingStats(String genreId, String startDateStr, String endDateStr)
    Calculates viewing statistics for all contents of a given genre between two dates.
    boolean
    isConnected(StreamingGraph subgraph)
    Checks if the graph or subgraph is connected (weak connectivity).
    Iterable<Content>
    recommendContent(String userId)
    Generates simple recommendations based on structural proximity.
    Iterable<String>
    shortestPathBetweenArtists(String fromArtistId, String toArtistId, StreamingGraph subgraph)
    Calculates the shortest path between two artists based on content they both participated in.
    Iterable<String>
    shortestPathUsersByFilm(String fromUserId, String toUserId, boolean fullyWatchedOnly)
    Finds the shortest path between two users based on shared movie contents watched.
    Iterable<String>
    shortestPathUsersByFollow(String fromUserId, String toUserId)
    Finds the shortest path between two users using only FOLLOWS relationships.
    Iterable<String>
    shortestPathUsersBySeries(String fromUserId, String toUserId, boolean fullyWatchedOnly, String episodeFilter)
    Finds the shortest path between two users based on shared series contents watched.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • GraphService

      public GraphService(StreamingDatabase db)

  • Method Details

    • shortestPathUsersByFollow

      public Iterable<String> shortestPathUsersByFollow(String fromUserId, String toUserId)
      Finds the shortest path between two users using only FOLLOWS relationships.
      Parameters:
      fromUserId - source user identifier
      toUserId - target user identifier
      Returns:
      sequence of user IDs representing the path

    • shortestPathUsersByFilm

      public Iterable<String> shortestPathUsersByFilm(String fromUserId, String toUserId, boolean fullyWatchedOnly)
      Finds the shortest path between two users based on shared movie contents watched. Treats film watch relationships as undirected connections.
      Parameters:
      fromUserId - source user identifier
      toUserId - target user identifier
      fullyWatchedOnly - filter to only consider fully watched contents
      Returns:
      sequence of entity IDs representing the path

    • shortestPathUsersBySeries

      public Iterable<String> shortestPathUsersBySeries(String fromUserId, String toUserId, boolean fullyWatchedOnly, String episodeFilter)
      Finds the shortest path between two users based on shared series contents watched. Treats series watch relationships as undirected connections. Supports filtering by fully watched and specific episode tags.
      Parameters:
      fromUserId - source user identifier
      toUserId - target user identifier
      fullyWatchedOnly - filter to only consider fully watched contents
      episodeFilter - optional substring filter for episode tags (e.g. "Ep1")
      Returns:
      sequence of entity IDs representing the path

    • extractGenreSubgraph

      public StreamingGraph extractGenreSubgraph(String genreId)
      Extracts a subgraph containing only content of a given genre.
      Parameters:
      genreId - genre identifier to filter
      Returns:
      the extracted subgraph

    • extractGenreUserSubgraph

      public StreamingGraph extractGenreUserSubgraph(String genreId)
      Extracts a subgraph containing only users, content of a given genre, and their watch/rate relationships.
      Parameters:
      genreId - genre identifier to filter
      Returns:
      the extracted subgraph

    • extractRegionSubgraph

      public StreamingGraph extractRegionSubgraph(String region)
      Extracts a subgraph containing only users of a given region and their watched/rated content.
      Parameters:
      region - region identifier (e.g. "US", "Europe")
      Returns:
      the extracted subgraph

    • extractRatingSubgraph

      public StreamingGraph extractRatingSubgraph(double minRating)
      Extracts a subgraph with rating relationships above a minimum threshold.
      Parameters:
      minRating - minimum rating score (inclusive)
      Returns:
      the extracted subgraph

    • extractUserArtistSubgraph

      public StreamingGraph extractUserArtistSubgraph()
      Extracts a subgraph containing Users, Artists, and their related Content items. Maps user interactions and artist cast participations.
      Returns:
      the extracted subgraph

    • extractUserUserSubgraph

      public StreamingGraph extractUserUserSubgraph()
      Extracts a subgraph containing only Users and their follow relationships. Maps user-to-user social connections.
      Returns:
      the extracted subgraph

    • extractArtistContentSubgraph

      public StreamingGraph extractArtistContentSubgraph()
      Extracts a subgraph containing only Artists, Content items, and their participation relationships. Maps artist participation in media contents.
      Returns:
      the extracted subgraph

    • shortestPathBetweenArtists

      public Iterable<String> shortestPathBetweenArtists(String fromArtistId, String toArtistId, StreamingGraph subgraph)
      Calculates the shortest path between two artists based on content they both participated in. Operates on the provided subgraph (e.g. extractUserArtistSubgraph()) rather than the full graph. Treats participation as undirected connections.
      Parameters:
      fromArtistId - source artist identifier
      toArtistId - target artist identifier
      subgraph - the subgraph to operate on (e.g. user-artist subgraph)
      Returns:
      sequence of entity IDs representing the path

    • isConnected

      public boolean isConnected(StreamingGraph subgraph)
      Checks if the graph or subgraph is connected (weak connectivity).
      Parameters:
      subgraph - target graph structure to check
      Returns:
      true if connected, false otherwise

    • recommendContent

      public Iterable<Content> recommendContent(String userId)
      Generates simple recommendations based on structural proximity. Finds users followed by the user, collects contents they watched, and filters out contents already watched by the target user.
      Parameters:
      userId - user identifier to generate recommendations for
      Returns:
      collection of recommended contents

    • getContentViewingStats

      public String getContentViewingStats(String contentId, String startDateStr, String endDateStr)
      Calculates viewing statistics for a specific content item between two dates.
      Parameters:
      contentId - content identifier
      startDateStr - start date in ISO format (yyyy-MM-dd)
      endDateStr - end date in ISO format (yyyy-MM-dd)
      Returns:
      formatted statistics string indicating views and hours

    • getGenreViewingStats

      public String getGenreViewingStats(String genreId, String startDateStr, String endDateStr)
      Calculates viewing statistics for all contents of a given genre between two dates.
      Parameters:
      genreId - genre identifier
      startDateStr - start date in ISO format (yyyy-MM-dd)
      endDateStr - end date in ISO format (yyyy-MM-dd)
      Returns:
      formatted statistics string indicating views and hours

    • findUsersWithHighWatchTime

      public Iterable<User> findUsersWithHighWatchTime(String genreId, String startDateStr, String endDateStr)
      Finds users who watched series of a specific genre within a given time interval. Strictly filters for series content types.
      Parameters:
      genreId - genre identifier to filter
      startDateStr - start date in ISO format (yyyy-MM-dd)
      endDateStr - end date in ISO format (yyyy-MM-dd)
      Returns:
      collection of matching users

    • findFollowersWhoWatchedSameFilm

      public Iterable<User> findFollowersWhoWatchedSameFilm(String userId, String filmId, String startDateStr, String endDateStr)
      Determines which followers of a user watched a given film in a given time interval. Strictly filters for movie content types.
      Parameters:
      userId - target user identifier
      filmId - content (film) identifier
      startDateStr - start date in ISO format (yyyy-MM-dd)
      endDateStr - end date in ISO format (yyyy-MM-dd)
      Returns:
      collection of matching followers (users)
